summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of KORKMAN2 driver login/setup flow. All features working correctly: name entry (Velkommen!), plate entry (Hej [name]!), localStorage persistence, logout clearing localStorage, editable vehicle plate on main page, and admin access.
passed_tests: Driver setup: Fresh visit (cleared localStorage) shows 'Velkommen!' name entry screen with data-testid='driver-setup'
Driver setup: Name entry screen shows 'Velkommen!' text and 'Indtast dit navn for at komme i gang'
Driver setup: After entering name 'Test Driver' and clicking 'Næste', shows plate entry with 'Hej Test Driver!'
Driver setup: Setup step 2 shows 'Hvilken vogn kører du i dag?' message
Driver setup: After entering plate 'AB 12 345' and clicking 'Start', shows main app
Driver persistence: After page refresh, setup screen NOT shown (name persisted in localStorage)
Driver persistence: Driver name 'Test Driver' visible in header after refresh
Driver persistence: Vehicle plate 'AB 12 345' preserved in input after refresh
Plate editable: Vehicle plate input on main page is editable (tested changing to 'XY 99 999')
Driver logout: Clicking logout button clears localStorage and shows setup screen again
Driver logout: localStorage keys 'korkman2_driver_name' and 'korkman2_vehicle_reg' are null after logout
Admin link: 'Admin' link on setup screen opens Admin Login modal with Brugernavn/Adgangskode fields
Admin access: Admin login with admin/ilkaps works from header button
Admin page: Shows 5 tabs (Ture, Planlægning, Chauffører, Genbrugsplads, Historik)
Admin logout: Logging out from admin returns to main app
Main app: Header shows driver name 'Test Driver', logout button (LogOut icon), admin button (Shield icon)
Main app: Stats bar shows Færdig, Total kg, Arbejdstid, Plads tilbage counters
Main app: 'Vælg Plads / Område' section with multiple plads buttons (Glostrup, Herlev, etc.)
Main app: Plads selection works - clicking Glostrup shows 17 tour rows
Main app: Tour table has 8 columns (FRAKTION, MODTAGEANLÆG, ADRESSE, CONT., ÅBEN, VÆGT, TID, HANDLINGER)
Main app: 'Tilføj tur manuelt' form with Fraktion, Modtageanlæg, Adresse, Container inputs
Main app: 'Generer PDF' button is present and enabled
Auto date/time: Date input shows current date (2026-03-15)
No JavaScript console errors during entire driver setup flow
critical_code_review_comments: Setup flow properly checks localStorage on load (line 1425-1427)
handleLogoutDriver correctly clears both localStorage keys (lines 1492-1502)
handleChangePlate allows editing plate on main page (line 1487-1489)
data-testid attributes properly applied: driver-setup, setup-step-name, setup-name-input, setup-name-btn, setup-step-plate, setup-plate-input, setup-plate-btn, vehicle-reg-input
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage to create test driver session, cleared after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver setup flow verified working: 1) Clear localStorage -> 'Velkommen!' name entry screen. 2) Enter name -> 'Hej [name]!' plate entry screen. 3) Enter plate -> Main app with driver info in header. 4) Refresh -> Main app persists (no setup screen). 5) Logout -> localStorage cleared, setup screen shown. Plate is editable on main page via data-testid='vehicle-reg-input'. Admin login: admin/ilkaps. All data-testid selectors confirmed working.
